query: I just finished the PRD and the technical spec for our billing rewrite. Before I send them to engineering, can you cross-check them and make sure nothing contradicts? The PRD is at docs/PRD.md and the spec is at docs/TECH-SPEC.md

we've got three config files — .env.production, docker-compose.prod.yml, and terraform/variables.tf — and I'm pretty sure the database port is different in at least two of them. can you check all three and tell me what doesn't match?

I need to hand off these onboarding docs to a new hire on Monday. There's a README, a CONTRIBUTING guide, and a SETUP doc in the repo root. Can you make sure they're all telling the same story about how to get the project running?

our design system has tokens in tokens.json, some CSS custom properties in globals.css, and then the tailwind config also defines colours. I bet they've drifted. Can you check if the colour values actually match across all three?

the API routes file says the rate limit is 100/min but I swear the SDK docs say 60. And the changelog might have changed it again. Can you look at routes.md, sdk-docs.md, and changelog.md and figure out which values are current?

I've been writing the architecture doc and the deployment runbook separately and I have a feeling they might disagree about which cloud provider we're on. Check docs/ARCHITECTURE.md and docs/DEPLOY.md for me?

before we ship this feature, can you verify that the openapi.yaml spec, the handler code in src/routes/, and the user-facing docs in docs/api/ all describe the same endpoints with the same request/response shapes?

i think our CLAUDE.md and the project README might be saying different things about the tech stack. also the package.json dependencies tell yet another story. can you cross-reference all three and flag anything that doesn't line up?
we just merged like 4 PRs into the planning docs folder and I want to make sure nobody introduced contradictions. can you scan everything in docs/planning/ and check they're all coherent?
the VISION.md says we support 5 languages but the ROADMAP.md only lists 3 in the v1 milestone and the SPEC.md says 4. which is it? check docs/VISION.md docs/ROADMAP.md docs/SPEC.md
can you review my pull request? it's PR #47 on the main repo. I changed the auth middleware and want to make sure the code looks good before I merge
I need to write a migration script that moves data from the old users table to the new one. The schema is in prisma/schema.prisma. Can you help me write it?
can you read through src/utils/parser.ts and explain what the transformPayload function does? I inherited this code and I'm having trouble following the logic
I want to refactor our error handling — right now we have try/catch blocks everywhere but I want a centralised error handler. Can you help restructure the code in src/middleware/?
we need to add dark mode support to the dashboard. The design tokens are in tokens.json and the components are in src/components/. Can you implement the theme toggle?
can you check if our eslint config and prettier config have any conflicting rules? I keep getting formatting fights when I save. Files are .eslintrc.json and .prettierrc
I need to debug why the login endpoint returns 500 sometimes. Can you look at the error logs in logs/api.log and the handler at src/routes/auth.ts and figure out what's going wrong?
can you generate a changelog from the last 20 commits? I need it for the release notes. Use conventional commit format if possible
I want to compare our current API response times against the SLOs we defined. The SLO targets are in docs/SLOs.md and the latest metrics are in monitoring/dashboard-export.json. Are we meeting them?
can you write unit tests for the calculateDiscount function in src/pricing.ts? It takes a cart object and a coupon code and should apply percentage or fixed discounts based on the coupon type
